message:
feat(tests): add resource accounting + admission stress to leak regression E2E (bd-105vq)

Extend leak_regression_e2e.rs with 15 new tests covering:
- ResourceAccounting integration with lab runtime obligation lifecycle
- Admission control stress with RegionLimits (max_obligations, max_tasks, max_children)
- Cross-validation: ResourceAccounting counters agree with MarkingAnalyzer results
- Multi-seed accounting invariant checks (500 seeds, zero leaks)
- Budget consumption and high-water mark tracking
- Structured snapshot summary artifact output

Total: 48 tests (33 existing + 15 new), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
